Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sky's Mercy]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Sky's Mercy is a vessel Cassias mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Sky's Mercy is the personal cloudship of the Arelius family Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Sky's Mercy is a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Sky's Mercy is a flying building/house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Sky's Mercy has a reservoir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Sky's Mercy is a vessel with a control board.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Sky's Mercy contains six bedrooms, a washroom, a bar, a training room, and a silent chamber for cycling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Sky's Mercy is a vessel used for descent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Sky's Mercy is a vessel that Lindon and others have traveled on.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Sky's Mercy is a location where Lindon is currently staying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Sky's Mercy was wrecked on the side of a mountain.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
